title: Family
description: Family lineage groups — del Valle family, Newhall family, Acosta family, etc.

title: Cultural Group
description: Ethnic and cultural communities — Tataviam people, Californio community, Chinese railroad workers, Japanese American farming community, Basque settlers

title: Informal Association
description: Groups without formal legal structure — posses, clubs, crews, social associations

title: Expedition Party
description: Historical expedition and exploration parties — Portolá Expedition, De Anza Expedition, Bennett-Arcan Party

title: Military Unit Informal
description: Informal military groups — California Battalion, irregular militia, volunteer companies
